title: Hezbollah ignites blowback from its base as over 1 million flee war with Israel
summary_full: The militant group’s attacks on Israel have sparked anger even among its most loyal Shiite supporters in Lebanon, weakening its clout as the war widens.
summary_public: The militant group’s attacks on Israel have sparked anger even among its most loyal Shiite supporters in Lebanon, weakening its clout as the war widens.

LB.label: negative
LB.evidence: weakening its clout as the war widens
